pageContext.name: Monkey D. Luffy
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Tamashii Nations present a new entry in the FigurartsZERO series, the Monkey D. Luffy Collectible Figure!  From the acclaimed manga and anime One Piece, Monkey D. Luffy is portrayed here in the powerful form he takes during GEAR4 Battle of Monsters on Onigashima.  The FiguartsZERO series feature dynamic fixed-pose figures with spectacular effect parts.
